Description: Verify applying for a leave request
Pre-condition: User is logged in Leave module
Test Steps:
1. Click Apply link
2. Select Leave Type
3. Enter Start Date and End Date
4. Add comments and click Apply

Pre-condition: User is logged in Leave module
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to My Leave list
2. Check status of latest request
Expected Result: Latest leave displays correct status (e.g. 'Pending Approval')

Pre-condition: User is logged in Leave module
Test Steps: 1. Check details of latest leave item in My Leave list
Expected Result: Leave type, dates, and comment details are displayed correctly
